title: Gravity Forms Monday.com Integration Premium Add-on
excerpt:

posts.author: BongHuynh (Bong 'Grace' T. HUYNH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Integrate Gravity Forms with Monday.com Effortlessly
If your workflow depends on Gravity Forms and you’re looking to sync submissions with Monday.com, the Gravity Forms Monday.com Integration Premium Add-on is the perfect solution. It allows you to automatically create or update items on your Monday boards whenever a form is submitted—streamlining task management and improving team collaboration.

What is the Gravity Forms Monday.com Integration Premium Add-on?

This premium add-on connects Gravity Forms directly with Monday.com, making it easy to send form data to your project boards in real time. Whether you’re managing leads, support requests, or project updates, this integration ensures your data flows smoothly between platforms—no manual entry required.

Key Features:

Automatic Item Creation – Instantly create or update items in Monday.com whenever a Gravity Form is submitted.
Dynamic Field Mapping – Effortlessly map form fields to Monday.com board columns to ensure accurate data transfer.
Multiple Form Support – Integrate an unlimited number of Gravity Forms with different Monday boards.
Board & Workspace Selection – Choose the specific Monday.com board and columns for each form feed.
Error Logging – View detailed API error logs to simplify troubleshooting and ensure smooth integration.
Multiple API Keys Support – Connect multiple Monday.com accounts by configuring different API keys.
No Coding Required – All settings can be configured visually through the WordPress admin dashboard.

This add-on provides a powerful and user-friendly way to automate your workflow, reduce manual effort, and keep your Monday.com boards up to date with the latest form submissions.

To learn more about the Gravity Forms Monday.com Integration Premium Add-on and how it can enhance your form automation, visit the product page.
